# PMP Quiz - Free PMP Exam Practice App

> A free, mobile-friendly, offline-capable web application for PMP (Project Management Professional) exam preparation. Features 420+ scenario-based practice questions covering all PMI ECO domains.

## About

This is a Progressive Web App (PWA) that helps PMP exam candidates practice with realistic scenario-based questions. All questions are aligned with the PMI Examination Content Outline (ECO) 2021 and cover three domains: People (42%), Process (50%), and Business Environment (8%).

### Key Features

- 420+ original scenario-based questions (not actual exam questions)
- Available in 5 languages: Japanese, English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean
- Mobile-friendly, works offline via Service Worker
- Track weak areas with accuracy statistics
- Bookmark questions for later review
- Quiz modes: all questions, weak questions only, bookmarked, or by domain
- 100% free, no sign-up required

### Exam Domains Covered

- **People** (42%): Leadership, team management, conflict resolution, stakeholder engagement, emotional intelligence, coaching, ethics
- **Process** (50%): Planning, execution, monitoring, risk management, scope/schedule/cost management, quality, procurement, agile/hybrid methodologies
- **Business Environment** (8%): Benefits management, compliance, organizational change, strategic alignment

## URLs

- Main App (Japanese): https://pmp-test.jp/
- Main App (English): https://pmp-test.site/
- What is PMP? (English): https://pmp-test.site/what-is-pmp
- What is PMP? (Spanish): https://pmp-test.site/what-is-pmp-es
- What is PMP? (Chinese): https://pmp-test.site/what-is-pmp-zh
- What is PMP? (Korean): https://pmp-test.site/what-is-pmp-ko
- What is PMP? (Indonesian): https://pmp-test.site/what-is-pmp-id
- PMP Practice Questions (Spanish): https://pmp-test.site/preguntas-pmp
